## Before you file

Please run the [ado-aw debug prompt](https://github.com/githubnext/ado-aw/blob/main/prompts/debug-ado-agentic-workflow.md) first, then include its output summary in this issue.

This helps us reproduce problems faster and capture the pipeline/runtime context we need.
